description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image viraweb/mblowfish-angularjs-builder:1.0.0 with a cache on node_modules. Define two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a grunt_build job that runs npm install, bower install --allow-root --no-interactive, chmod 777 -fR ., su builder -c "grunt", and then pipes all lcov.info files to node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN; it stores the generated ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}.zip and the doc directory as artifacts, reports coverage using the regex /Lines\s*:\s*(\d+\.\d+)%/, and runs only on the master and develop branches. In the deploy stage add a marketplace_deploy job that runs npm install, bower install --allow-root --no-interactive, chmod 777 -fR ., su builder -c "grunt build", and uploads the ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}.zip file via curl to the marketplace API using the $MARKETPLACE_TOKEN; this job runs only on the master branch.
